name: io.github.WRG-11/wrg-mcp-server
title: WinstonRedGuard MCP Server
description: WinstonRedGuard monorepo bridge for MCP agents: governance, pipelines, memory, OSINT tools.

packageArguments.name: --transport
packageArguments.description: Transport to use (stdio for desktop clients; streamable-http or sse for HTTP deployments).

environmentVariables.name: WRG_REPO_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the WinstonRedGuard monorepo checkout. Required when the package is installed outside the repo (the server auto-detects when run from inside the repo).

environmentVariables.name: WRG_MCP_ALLOW_MUTATIONS
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to permit state-changing tools (memory_set, pipeline_run). Default '0' = read-only.

environmentVariables.name: WRG_SITE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the optional company-site API (enables site_* tools). Requires the `[remote]` extra.

environmentVariables.name: WRG_SITE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the company-site API.

environmentVariables.name: WRG_PULSEBOARD_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the optional PulseBoard dashboard API (enables pulseboard_* tools). Requires the `[remote]` extra.

environmentVariables.name: WRG_PULSEBOARD_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the PulseBoard API.
